name: thread.push_outbox
description: Push an outbox entry through the current thread adapter and return the refreshed thread.

thread.description: Current hydrated thread for the bounded provider surface.

outbox_entry.description: Outbox entry to push through the thread adapter.

draft_pull_request.description: Provider-agnostic draft pull-request packet paired with the outbox entry.

fixture.description: Optional governed workspace root inherited from issue-to-pr style lanes.

workspace_path.description: Optional workspace root used by adapters that need local git state to publish outputs upstream.

next_status.description: Optional status to apply after a successful provider push, such as `draft`.
